title: How Much Does a Website Cost for a Small Business in Poland?
description: Website pricing in Poland ranges from a few hundred złoty to tens of thousands. Here's what you actually get at each price point — and what's worth paying for.
content:
The Honest Answer: It Depends

If you search for website costs online, you'll find wildly varying numbers — from 500 zł to 50 000 zł or more. Everyone seems to be selling something different. So what's actually going on?

The short answer: you're not buying the same product at these different price points. Understanding what you're actually getting helps you make a smarter decision for your business.

Option 1: Free Website Builders (0–50 zł/month)

Platforms like Wix, Weebly, or Google Sites let you build a website for free or near-free. Sounds great, right?

The problem: free website builders are designed for simplicity, not results. They typically:

  • Have poor local SEO capabilities
  • Load slowly (hurting both rankings and user experience)
  • Look generic — not designed to convert visitors into customers
  • Show the platform's branding (Wix ads) on free plans
  • Don't include any setup or strategy — you're on your own

For a local business trying to compete in search results, free website builders are usually a false economy. You spend hours building something that doesn't actually work.

Option 2: Cheap Local Web Designers (500–1 500 zł)

At the lower end of the market, you typically get a junior freelancer or a student project. Sometimes the result is fine — but there are real risks:

  • No ongoing support: when something breaks, they may be unavailable
  • Poor code quality that slows down your site
  • No SEO strategy — the site looks nice but doesn't get found
  • No mobile optimization

For a one-page portfolio or a very simple informational site, this can work. For a business that depends on online visibility, it often ends in frustration.

Option 3: Professional Studio (1 990–5 000 zł)

This is the range where you get a genuinely professional result: custom design, mobile optimization, local SEO setup, fast hosting, and ongoing support.

What you get at this level:

  • A website designed specifically for your business and your customers
  • Proper local SEO from day one (your business will actually appear in search)
  • Mobile-first design (critical when 70%+ of searches are on mobile)
  • Fast loading (Google ranks fast sites higher)
  • Support when you need updates or something breaks
  • Google Business Profile setup

This is the sweet spot for most local businesses in Poland. Our Starter package at 1 990 zł delivers all of this — plus you see the finished product before you pay anything.

Option 4: Agency Projects (5 000–50 000+ zł)

Large agencies charge more for a reason: complex projects, e-commerce, custom development, and teams of specialists. For a restaurant or a plumber, this is usually overkill.

Where it makes sense: online shops with hundreds of products, booking systems with complex logic, multi-location businesses with different needs in each city, or businesses with very high marketing budgets.

The Hidden Cost: Monthly Fees

Whatever you pay upfront, factor in the ongoing costs:

  • Domain: around 50–100 zł/year
  • Hosting: 30–150 zł/month depending on quality
  • Maintenance and updates: either your time or a monthly plan
  • SSL certificate: usually included in hosting

Our monthly plans start at 99 zł and include hosting, security, automatic backups, and content updates. That's less than most phone bills — and your website runs itself.

What's the ROI?

Let's do simple maths. If a professional website at 1 990 zł brings you even one new customer per month — worth, say, 300–500 zł in revenue — the investment pays off within 4–7 months. After that, every new customer from Google is pure profit from your website.

Most businesses we work with start seeing new enquiries within the first 30 days. The website pays for itself quickly.

Our Recommendation

For most local businesses in Poland, a professionally built website in the 1 990–3 990 zł range is the right investment. It's real money — but it's a business asset that works for you 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

And if you want to see what you'd get before spending anything? That's exactly what our free preview offer is for.
